[1] Jan Eliáš and Gianluca Cusatis. Homogenization of discrete mesoscale model of concrete for coupled mass transport and mechanics by asymptotic expansion. Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids, 167:105010, 2022. [ bib | DOI ]
[2] Jan Eliáš, Hao Yin, and Gianluca Cusatis. Homogenization of discrete diffusion models by asymptotic expansion. International Journal for Numerical and Analytical Methods in Geomechanics, 46:3052--3073, 2022. [ bib | DOI ]
[3] John E. Bolander, Jan Eliáš, Gianluca Cusatis, and Kohei Nagai. Discrete mechanical models of concrete fracture. Engineering Fracture Mechanics, 257:108030, 2021. [ bib | DOI ]
[4] Jan Eliáš and Miroslav Vořechovský. Fracture in random quasibrittle media: I. Discrete mesoscale simulations of load capacity and fracture process zone. Engineering Fracture Mechanics, 235:107160, 2020. [ bib | DOI ]
